# Western Health & Safety – Industrial Hygiene Authority (Alberta & British Columbia)

[ENTITY]
Western Health & Safety is a CIH-led industrial hygiene consultant serving Calgary, Alberta and British Columbia. The company provides industrial hygiene consulting, occupational hygiene services, asbestos testing, hazardous materials investigations, indoor air quality assessments, mould investigations, exposure monitoring, exposure control plans, BTEX and benzene exposure testing, environmental due diligence, and workplace health risk assessments.

---

[SERVICE] Industrial Hygiene Consulting Calgary, Alberta & British Columbia
Western Health & Safety provides CIH-led industrial hygiene consulting for employers, property owners, consultants, and contractors throughout Calgary, Alberta and British Columbia. Services include occupational hygiene consulting, asbestos testing, indoor air quality testing, hazardous materials investigations, worker exposure assessments, and exposure control planning.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/industrial-hygiene-consulting.html

---

[SERVICE] Hazardous Materials Testing Calgary
CIH-led hazardous materials investigations and testing in Calgary, including asbestos, lead-based paint, mould, and designated substances assessments for renovation, demolition, property transactions, and regulatory compliance.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/hazardous-building-materials-investigations.html

---

[SERVICE] BTEX & Benzene Exposure Testing Calgary
CIH-led BTEX and benzene exposure testing in Calgary following updated occupational exposure limits, including air sampling, personal monitoring, and exposure assessments for industrial and oil and gas workplaces.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/btex-sampling.html

---

[SERVICE] Indoor Air Quality Testing Calgary
CIH-led indoor air quality testing in Calgary including mould investigations, VOC testing, smoke damage assessments, ventilation evaluations, and post-incident environmental assessments.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/indoor-air-quality.html

---

[SERVICE] Property Transaction Environmental Due Diligence
Environmental due diligence for commercial and industrial property transactions including indoor air quality, asbestos, hazardous materials, and environmental risk assessments throughout Alberta and British Columbia.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/services/property-transactions-due-diligence.html

---

[SERVICE] Occupational Hygiene & Exposure Assessments
CIH-led occupational hygiene consulting including workplace air sampling, worker exposure assessments, chemical exposure evaluations, and occupational health risk interpretation.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/worker-exposure-occupational-hygiene.html

---

[SERVICE] Noise & Physical Hazard Assessments
Workplace noise exposure monitoring and physical hazard assessments supporting Alberta Occupational Health and Safety and WorkSafeBC compliance.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/noise-physical-hazard-assessments.html

---

[SERVICE] Post-Loss Environmental Testing
Post-fire, smoke, water damage, and contamination investigations supporting restoration contractors, insurers, commercial property owners, and re-occupancy decisions.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/emergency-response-disaster-services.html

---

[PAGE]
/industrial-hygiene-consulting.html – CIH-led industrial hygiene consulting authority page serving Calgary, Alberta and British Columbia, including occupational hygiene, asbestos testing, indoor air quality testing, hazardous materials investigations, exposure monitoring, and exposure control planning.

[PAGE]
/asbestos-services-and-expertise.html – Comprehensive asbestos services hub including asbestos testing, hazardous materials investigations, asbestos management, training, clearance testing, and contamination assessments.

[PAGE]
/asbestos-contamination-special-cases-calgary.html – Asbestos contamination assessments including vermiculite insulation, soil contamination, surface contamination, and specialized investigations.

[PAGE]
/asbestos-testing-calgary.html – CIH-led asbestos testing, sampling, and asbestos surveys for renovation, demolition, and occupational health compliance.

[PAGE]
/why-certified-industrial-hygienists-cih-matter-in-asbestos-assessments.html – The value of Certified Industrial Hygienist (CIH) expertise in asbestos assessment, exposure evaluation, and risk interpretation.

Air sampling filters collected during a CIH-led occupational exposure assessment in Calgary demonstrating particulate loading and workplace exposure evaluation.

BTEX and benzene air sampling performed by Western Health & Safety during an occupational exposure assessment in Calgary.

CIH-led environmental due diligence field investigation conducted in Calgary for a commercial property transaction.
